label: Screen
instruction: Optional hidden screen sensory feedback may be attached as a hidden screenshot message. Treat it as background situational awareness, not as a direct user request. Only mention what you infer from it if it is genuinely relevant to the conversation.
description: Captures all screens or a selected monitor as hidden ambient context.

ping_payload.description: hidden screenshot attachment sent to the model
source label and capture timestamp framing the screenshot as ambient context
selected monitor label, size, and virtual desktop position
screen coordinate bounds for the captured desktop area

pong_influences.description: application or task focus inferred from the screen
